Our client is seeking a Cloud Engineer in Richmond, VA/Hybrid.

Role Description

• The Cloud Engineer serves as the senior technical leader responsible for designing, implementing, automating, and optimizing cloud infrastructure and platform services across the organization. This role provides hands-on engineering expertise and technical leadership to support enterprise cloud initiatives, ensuring secure, scalable, resilient, and cost-effective cloud solutions.
The Cloud Engineer partners closely with Enterprise Architecture, Security, Infrastructure, Application Development, and Data teams to advance the organization's cloud strategy and accelerate the adoption of modern cloud-native technologies. This individual will lead complex cloud engineering efforts, establish engineering standards, and drive automation across cloud platforms while serving as a technical mentor to engineering teams

Cloud Engineering & Platform Delivery
• Design, build, and maintain scalable cloud infrastructure primarily within Microsoft Azure.
• Lead implementation of cloud platforms, landing zones, networking, identity services, and shared infrastructure capabilities.
• Develop Infrastructure as Code (IaC) solutions using Terraform, Bicep, ARM templates, or similar technologies.
• Engineer and support highly available, fault-tolerant cloud environments.
• Automate infrastructure provisioning, configuration management, monitoring, and operational processes.
• Develop reusable cloud patterns, standards, and templates for enterprise adoption.

DevOps & Automation
• Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines supporting application and infrastructure deployments.
• Implement cloud automation strategies that improve reliability, operational efficiency, and deployment velocity.
• Partner with development teams to support cloud-native application architectures and deployment practices.
• Promote DevSecOps principles throughout the software development lifecycle.

Cloud Security & Governance
• Implement cloud security controls aligned with organizational and regulatory requirements.
• Support identity and access management, network security, encryption, logging, monitoring, and vulnerability remediation.
• Ensure cloud environments adhere to governance standards, operational best practices, and compliance requirements.
• Collaborate with security teams to identify and mitigate cloud risks.

Operational Excellence
• Monitor cloud performance, availability, utilization, and cost optimization.
• Troubleshoot and resolve complex infrastructure and platform issues.
• Establish reliability, observability, disaster recovery, and business continuity solutions.
• Drive root cause analysis and continuous improvement initiatives.

Technical Leadership
• Provide technical leadership across cloud engineering initiatives.
• Mentor and guide engineers on cloud technologies, automation, and operational best practices.
• Evaluate emerging cloud technologies, tools, and services.
• Participate in architectural reviews and technical decision-making processes.
• Serve as a subject matter expert for cloud infrastructure and platform engineering.

Skills & Requirements

• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field; equivalent experience may be considered.
• 8+ years of infrastructure, systems engineering, cloud engineering, or DevOps experience.
• 5+ years of hands-on experience designing and supporting Azure cloud environments.
• Strong experience with Infrastructure as Code using Terraform, Bicep, ARM, or similar technologies.
• Experience implementing CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, or related tools.
• Strong understanding of cloud networking, DNS, firewalls, application gateways, load balancing, and hybrid connectivity.
• Experience supporting containerized workloads using Kubernetes and Docker technologies.
• Proficiency with PowerShell, Bash, Python, or other automation and scripting languages.
• Experience with cloud monitoring, logging, observability, and operational automation.
• Strong troubleshooting, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
• Ability to communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
• Microsoft Azure certifications (AZ-104, AZ-305, AZ-400, or equivalent).
• Experience supporting healthcare, government, or regulated environments.
• Experience with Zero Trust security principles.
• Experience with container orchestration platforms such as Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS).
• Experience with cloud cost optimization and FinOps practices.
• Familiarity with networking technologies including ExpressRoute, VPN, and hybrid cloud connectivity.
• Experience leading large-scale cloud migration and modernization initiatives.
• 8+ years of progressive experience in cloud engineering, cloud architecture, or infrastructure platform roles
• Terraform or Bicep Experience
• Cloud Architecture Expertise
• IaC (Infrastructure as Code)
• Azure
• Azure Certifications: Solutions Architect AZ-305 (preferred), AZ-104 Administrator

Benefits/Other Compensation

This position is a contract/temporary role where Hays offers you the opportunity to enroll in full medical benefits, dental benefits, vision benefits, 401K and Life Insurance ($20,000 benefit).

Our client is seeking an QA Engineer in Vienna, VA/Hybrid.

Role Description

Quality Engineer with strong experience across both manual and automation testing, supporting enterprise scale payments systems. The role will focus on ACH Modernization testing, including SaaS platforms, APIs, and batch/file based processing, with execution integrated into Azure DevOps pipelines.

Skills & Requirements

• Experience owning test strategy, test plans, and test execution across SIT, UAT, and regression.
• Hands on experience creating and managing test plans, test cases, and defects in Azure DevOps (ADO).
• Strong manual testing experience for SaaS applications and complex, multi system workflows.
• Experience testing batch and file based processing (financial or transactional systems preferred).
• Strong experience with backend / API automation testing (UI automation is secondary).
• Hands on experience with Java based automation frameworks.
• Experience using Maven, Git, and integrating automated tests into Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines.
• Ability to automate API flows, batch/file workflows, and regression scenarios.

• Experience testing API driven integrations and validating end to end data flows.
• Experience in payments, banking, or financial services strongly preferred.
• Familiarity with ACH or batch oriented financial processing is a plus.

• test strategy and test mgmt: exp across SIT, UAT, regression testing and ADO for test case and defect tracking
• Manual testing
• Batch and file based processing: specifically ACH files (looking for banking exp)
API & Backend automation
• Automation: java based automation frameworks, maven, GIT, ADO CI/CD

Our client is seeking a Sr System Engineer in Celebration, FL

Role Description

We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Sr Systems Engineer to join a team responsible for maintaining the operational efficiency and reliability of both our shipboard and shoreside systems and services. In this role, you will work at the intersection of technology, guest experience, and operational excellence, ensuring that we continuously minimize downtime and optimize the performance of our infrastructure. You will also drive the seamless integration of advanced technologies in the industry, aligning them with business needs and enhancing customer experiences. This position requires a proven and experienced engineer in DevSecOps, desired state configurations, Kubernetes provisioning and support in both on-prem datacenters and cloud platforms, with a focus on maintaining high availability, scalability, and security in critical systems. Supported platforms include, but aren’t limited to web applications, mobile applications, POS systems, payment gateways, reservation systems, safety systems, and order management. You will also collaborate with various teams to deliver industry-leading solutions that exceed guest expectations.

• Design, analyze, evaluate, test, debug and implement applications supporting company business processes and operations
• Analyze, install, acquire, modify, and support operating systems, database, or utilities software
• Plan, conduct, and direct the analysis of business problems to be solved with automated systems within a small scope or as directed.
• Contribute to the development, testing, evaluation or design of system or infrastructure architecture used throughout the IT solution set
• Advanced knowledge of code for desktop applications, software APIs, and automation for use by internal engineering and creative partners
• Aid in guiding teammates in the analysis and organization of common business problems to be solved with automated systems
• You will be expected to stay up to date with emerging technologies

Skills & Requirements

• Minimum 5 years of related work experience
• Technical experience in consumer and employee facing systems
• Ability to troubleshoot applications and systems
• Expertise in maintaining web, caching, and queuing technologies in large high traffic environments.
• Expertise in architecting highly scalable and highly available systems
• Expertise in a public cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP)
• Proficiency with containerization
• Proficiency in a programming language (Powershell, Python, Ruby, etc)
• Proficiency with distributed version control systems (e.g., GIT) with Continuous Integration/Deployment techniques (Azure DevOps, Jenkins, Harness, etc)
• Proficiency supporting SQL & Oracle technologies
• Comfortable working in an agile environment
• Proficiency in Kubernetes & Rancher, VMWare, DevSecOps, and Automation, with a proactive demeanor towards continuous learning and skill development, and an interest in mastering emerging data engineering tools and methodologies
• Bachelor's or Equivalent Work Experience
• Experience in the industry or similar high-availability, customer-centric industries.
• Certifications in AWS, Azure, VMware, Kubernetes, or related cloud technologies.
• RedHat OpenShift experience preferred
• Familiarity with ITIL or other IT service management frameworks
• Supported Technologies:
• Terraform/Atlantis
• AWS Cloud (Fargate, ECS, Lambdas, ApiGateways, EC2, S3, ALB/ELB, Elasticache, EKS, KMS-Secret Manager, VPCs, IAM)
• Logging/Monitoring/Alerting (Cloudwatch/Splunk/AppDynamics/Elasticache/Grafana)
• Rundeck, Chef, Ansible, Vault, AWX, Azure DevOps
• MessageQueueing: RabbitMQ, PubSub
• OpenShift, Kubernetes
• Load balancers, Akamai
• Languages: Go/Python/ Node.js (Angular.js framework)/Java (Spring MVC)
• Certifications in AWS, Azure, VMware, Kubernetes

Our client is seeking a QA Performance Engineer x 2 in Vienna, VA/Hybrid.

ROLE DESCRIPTION

The Digital Delivery team is responsible for engineering and supporting modern web and mobile applications through the development of user interfaces, microservices, and scalable solutions across multiple devices and platforms. As a Performance Test Engineer, you will be responsible for executing end-to-end performance testing efforts while partnering with QA leads and leadership to support activities across multiple initiatives. This role requires strong hands-on performance engineering expertise, including designing, developing, and executing performance test strategies to validate system scalability, reliability, and stability. In addition, you will support senior leads and QA leadership in advancing performance testing processes, identifying risks and bottlenecks, analyzing test results, and driving performance improvement recommendations.

• Perform load, stress, endurance, and scalability testing to validate the production readiness of applications and infrastructure for stability and performance
• Design, develop, and execute performance test scripts and scenarios that accurately simulate realworld user behavior
• Build, maintain, and enhance automated performance testing solutions using tools such as NeoLoad or similar
• Analyze performance test results to identify bottlenecks, system constraints, and optimization opportunities
• Utilize monitoring and observability tools (AppInsights, Splunk, etc.) to assess system performance and troubleshoot issues
• Partner with cross-functional teams to integrate performance testing early in the SDLC.
• Define performance SLAs and establish baseline metrics using production insights to ensure realistic and measurable performance goals
• Identify, understand, and document system dependencies across services and applications for accurate test coverage and implement mocking strategies to isolate dependencies and enable stable, repeatable testing.
• Support stabilization and management of performance testing environment, ensuring consistency, reliability, and scalability
• Support QA leads and leadership in planning, prioritization, and execution of performance testing activities
• Assist in coordinating performance testing efforts across multiple initiatives to ensure timely and high-quality delivery
• Contribute to the development and continuous improvement of performance testing strategies, frameworks, and standards
• Document, track, and report defects identified during testing in accordance with established defect management processes. Collaborate with cross-functional teams and stakeholders to drive timely resolution, provide status updates, and communicate risks, trends, and outcomes to leadership.
• Perform other duties as assigned.

SKILLS & REQUIREMENTS

• 4+ years of hands-on experience in software testing, with a strong emphasis on performance engineering, including performance test planning, execution, analysis, and optimization of application performance and scalability.
• Experience defining performance baselines and SLAs using production or production-like environments.
• Experience with dependency mapping, service virtualization, and mocking frameworks (WireMock preferred).
• Experience with monitoring and observability tools such as Azure App Insights, Splunk, or equivalent.
• Hands-on experience with Postman and performance testing tools such as NeoLoad or similar platforms.
• Proficiency with Azure DevOps or comparable test management tools for planning, executing, tracking, and reporting testing activities.
• Solid understanding of DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, and Agile methodologies.
• Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills, with the ability to identify root causes, assess risks, and drive effective resolutions for complex technical issues.
• Strong communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to effectively communicate both verbally and in writing across a variety of audiences and settings, including team members, business partners, technical teams, and all levels of leadership.
• Strong knowledge of performance testing methodologies, including load, stress, endurance, and scalability testing.
• Strong understanding of shift-left testing practices and early performance validation strategies
• Strong understanding of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC), Software Testing Lifecycle (STLC), and quality engineering best practices, including test strategy, test automation, defect management, and continuous quality improvement.
• Identifies performance risks before reaching production
• Strong knowledge and hands-on experience in technical analysis/problem solving
• Ability to analyze test results to identify bottlenecks.
• Hands-on experience with mocking/mocking tools (preferably WireMock)
• An understanding of functional testing (SDET)
• 5-10 years exp
• Performance testing (load/stress/endurance/scalability)
• Performance analysis & root cause analysis
• Automation scripting (JavaScript preferred)
• NeoLoad/JMeter or similar tool
• Monitoring tools (Splunk/App Insights)
• Azure DevOps / Agile / SDLC knowledge
• Ability to recommend performance improvements and prevent production issues

Benefits/Other Compensation

Medical, Dental, Life Insurance, 401K.

Our client is seeking a Senior Data Engineer in Buena Vista, FL

Role Description

• The DDSI Data Engineering (DE) team is seeking a Data Engineer to design, develop, enhance, and implement systems for multiple analytical applications.
• The work will involve various data engineering activities such as maintaining and enhancing data acquisition processes, data validation processes, ETL/ELT data pipelines, and overall process notification methods.
• Responsibilities of the Role: Work assignments may cover activities such as participation in data requirements gathering, source-to-target mapping, data validation scripting and review, developing and monitoring ETL/ELT data pipelines, and producing datasets as input to science models and visualizations.
• As part of a data engineering team, this role will be included in technical reviews of the team to ensure quality deliverables. In addition to technical capabilities, the role is responsible for developing an understanding of the business domain and processes, then applying that knowledge to the assigned deliverables.
• This role communicates data engineering progress to the project leadership team and actively participates in meetings and discussions.

Skills & Requirements

• Bachelor’s degree (Computer Science, Mathematics, Software Engineering or related field, or equivalent experience)
• 5+ years of experience with ELT/ETL development using SQL and Python
• 2+ years of experience developing and maintaining data pipeline processing with a framework such as Apache Flink, Beam or Kafka Streams
• Experience and understanding of one or more business domains to assist in gathering/refining data requirements and data design solutions
• Experience with developing in a multi environment (Dev, QA, Prod, etc.) and DevOps procedures for code deployment/promotion
• Strong understanding of database design and proficiency utilizing various database platforms, such as PostgreSQL or Snowflake
• Experience managing and deploying code using a source control product such as GitLab/GitHub
• Able to effectively formulate solutions and communicate complex technical concepts to non-technical team members
• Master’s degree (Computer Science, Mathematics, Engineering or related field preferred)
• Experience with infrastructure as Code, Docker and containerization and elastic scaling with Kubernetes or a similar framework and with AWS
• Experience working with large datasets and big data technologies, preferably cloud-based, such as Snowflake, Databricks, or similar
• Demonstrated proficiency with API development Knowledgeable on cloud architecture and product offerings, preferably AWS

Our client is seeking a Mobile Software Engineer in Buena Vista, FL

Role Description

The Mobile Software Engineer serves on the Device Engineering team and is primarily responsible for supporting application deployment, mobile device management, and the integration of hardware and software peripherals to enable efficient frontline and operational workflows. This role partners with internal and external stakeholders to deliver secure, scalable, and reliable mobile solutions that meet business needs across operations. In addition, the position supports the design, development, testing, deployment, support, and enhancement of mobile applications used by Cast Members across iOS and Android platforms. Success in this role requires strong engineering fundamentals, sound judgment, and the ability to collaborate effectively across technical and business teams to deliver high-quality products and continuous improvement.

• Support the deployment and lifecycle management of mobile applications and devices using mobility management platforms, including configuration, policy enforcement, operational readiness, and ongoing support activities.
• Coordinate with cross-functional teams to plan, implement, and support standardized device configurations and deployment approaches across multiple device types and operational environments.
• Integrate mobile devices and applications with hardware and software peripherals such as barcode scanners, NFC readers, printers, and related SDK- or firmware-based components.
• Partner with business and technical stakeholders to define requirements, evaluate use cases, and deliver solutions that align with security, compliance, and company standards.
• Contribute to issue resolution, technical documentation, continuous improvement, and support processes that improve reliability, usability, and maintainability of mobile solutions.
• Design, develop, test, deploy, maintain, and enhance mobile applications for iOS and Android in an environment.
• Apply modern software development lifecycle practices, source control, automated pipelines, and quality-focused engineering methods to deliver secure, scalable, and supportable solutions.

Skills & Requirements

• 4–5 years of relevant experience supporting mobile environments, including mobile application deployment, device lifecycle management, and operational support for internal users.
• Experience administering mobile device management solutions, preferably Workspace ONE (AirWatch), including smart groups, profiles, certificates, compliance policies, and deployment configuration.
• Demonstrated experience integrating mobile devices and applications with hardware and software peripherals, including barcode scanners, NFC readers, printers, SDKs, firmware, and related device communication components.
• Strong understanding of deployment practices, device configuration standards, support processes, and operational readiness activities in an mobility environment.
• Demonstrated experience developing mobile applications for iOS and Android using native and/or hybrid frameworks; experience with Flutter is preferred.
• Working knowledge of software development lifecycle practices, secure coding principles, testing, technical documentation, Python, scripting, systems integration, and tools such as SharePoint, Power Automate, Tableau, Power BI, and web-based data integration tools.
• Strong collaboration and communication skills, with the ability to build effective working relationships across teams, vendors, and business partners.

Our client is seeking a TPA in for a remote opportunity.

ROLE DESCRIPTION

• Experience with support on requirements gathering, analysis, documentation, leading Scrum meetings, ADO Board management, documenting Features, PBIs, User Stories etc., and working with cross functional teams to include business and technology
• The candidate may have strong interpersonal skills and be a self starter to work with vendors to support deployment involving fixes, upgrades, and implementing new technology utilizing Agile/hybrid methodologies.
• Experience with cloud migrations and implementations, SaaS solutions
